introSection: Mayan Adventure (Chinese: щжмщЫЕцОвщЪк) is an inverted roller coaster located at Formosan Aboriginal Culture Village in Yuchr Shiang, Nantou County, Taiwan. It is a Suspended Looping Coaster built by Vekoma.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Mayan Adventure passes through three tunnels in a highly themed envoirment.

fullText:
Mayan Adventure (Chinese: щжмщЫЕцОвщЪк) is an inverted roller coaster located at Formosan Aboriginal Culture Village in Yuchr Shiang, Nantou County, Taiwan. It is a Suspended Looping Coaster built by Vekoma.

Mayan Adventure passes through three tunnels in a highly themed envoirment.

White track and green supports.
